node.text:
The 40k Club. Only One Player.

The LeBron XXIII ‘Uncharted’ is more than a milestone. It’s about pushing the boundaries of greatness.

Arriving in SNKRS in select locations 10.3.
A’ja Wilson and Alanna Smith redefined the defensive game, earning this year’s @WNBA Co-DPOY award.

This was only her first rodeo…but it sure won’t be her last. @Paigebueckers riding high into year two.
#JustDoIt

Don’t just show up. Show Out.

From streetlights to stadiums, the Giannis Freak 7 “Spotlight” is made for the hoopers who are the brightest under the lights.

Get yours now.

If it ain’t 12, turn the TV off. 

Grab the Ja 3 ‘Channel 12’ now.

Welcome to basketball immortality.
 
The Basketball Hall of Fame has enshrined the class of 2025, a group that includes all-time WNBA assist leader Sue Bird, the USA men’s 2008 Olympic gold medal-winning “Redeem Team,” and 4x WNBA Defensive Player of the Year Sylvia Fowles. Take the trip to Springfield, stay forever.

Made for TV.

The Ja 3 ‘Channel 12.’ Featuring dual-colored shoes that’ll make them tune in. 

Available now.

The crown is heavy. The shoes are light. 

The courts longest reign is celebrated in the House of King James, Shanghai.

Fit for a King.
Introducing the LeBron XXIII. Give your game the royal treatment every time you grace the court.

Arriving 10.3. Get notified on SNKRS.

node.text:
Two days. The best in the country. And two teams who walked away with it all at the Mamba League Invitational. 

The energy? Unmatched. The weekend? Untouchable. Mamba Mode was felt all weekend long. 

Until next time, LA. 🐍

node.text:
Made ya look. 

Like the undeniable energy, effort and tenacity Giannis brings to the game, “Live Wire” is built to stand out — for the one whose game is impossible to ignore.

Get yours today.

Stand Out. Take Over. 

Command the court from baseline to baseline in the Giannis Freak 7 “Live Wire.” 

Available Now.

Make them watch, and then make them pay. 

The Ja 3 ‘Price of Admission.’ Available now.

node.text:
Old diamonds shine brighter in new eyes.

Basketball’s rising stars secured the Kobe 3 Protro but this weekend will be their moment to prove if they are certified….

🏆 Mamba League Invitational
📍 L.A. Live Peacock Place
🗓️ August 23rd & 24th

Don’t step into Rings-N-Things unless you can prove you’ve got the right mentality to wear the Kobe 3 Protro.

The shoe’s unmistakable diamond-inspired pattern serves as a subtle nod to Kobe’s oldest daughter, @nataliabryant. 

Available 8.23 on SNKRS in select regions. Get notified.
